name: Melomacarona ( Honey Dipped Cookies )
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pour oil into a large bowl.
3. Beat powdered sugar until creamy, about 5 minutes.
4. Add milk, baking powder, and soda; beat until combined.
5. Gradually add flour until the dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl.
6. Turn out onto a floured surface.
7. Knead for 5 minutes until the dough is soft and pliable.
8. Pinch off 1-1/2 inch pieces.
9. Form each piece into an oval, finger-like shape.
10. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
11. Bake for 20-30 minutes or until golden underneath; cookies will not brown on top.
12. Cool the cookies on the baking sheets.
13. Mix honey and water in a small pan.
14. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat.
15. Dip each cookie into the honey mixture.
16. Place on waxed paper.
17. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
